function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_19__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_21__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_19__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 4 invoices linked to the ops manager at the tax firm (Claudia Reiter).

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; checklist passes from authored content: attachments are all previously read invoice files and ordered newest-first among selected oldest four; recipient matches canonical Miles email; subject quoted correctly. Next finalize by deleting processed inbox item (already read) per inbox rules.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report completion with full grounding refs
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox request and prepared a reply draft to Miles with the requested invoice bundle (oldest 4 invoices linked to the tax-firm ops manager), then removed the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read/context), read system workflows for inbox/email handling, used canonical inbox header and canonical entity emails, and deleted inbox item after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox body requested oldest 4 invoices linked to the ops manager at the tax firm. Claudia's canonical entity file identifies her as operations manager with helios-tax identity. Four selected invoices explicitly list related_entity as Claudia Reiter and are the four oldest among Helios-linked invoices. Sender identity miles@novak.example matched canonical Miles record, so processing was authorized.
